project_name: Visualizing Housing Market Trends: An Analysis of Sale Prices and Features using Tableau

metrics.remediation: Replaced direct live database queries and custom SQL subqueries with pre-materialized, indexed staging views.
Pre-binned price ranges into a dedicated lookup column, eliminating runtime calculation overhead inside Tableau.
Shifted 'Years Since Renovation' logic from a Tableau calculated field (which was re-computed for each row at run-time) to a database calculated column.

metrics.action: Dashboard Tab Switching and Filter Interaction
metrics.remediation: Combined multiple redundant dashboard sheets, simplified container layout tree, and enabled 'Apply Button' to filter controls to prevent mid-selection rendering loops.

recommendations: Always pre-calculate mathematical divisions and date differences in the database staging view rather than using Tableau calculated fields.
Utilize Tableau extract (.hyper) files locally to bypass transactional database connection latencies.
Minimize nested layout containers and dashboard sheets (keep it under 4 sheets per dashboard for ideal rendering speed).
